false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7239753776880665377","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"截至2023.06.02看到148章，总体来说算是脑洞比较大，情节也和其他小说（至少是我看过的）不一样，整体节奏也不错。
剧情上属于很明显的“爽文”。这里爽文无褒无贬，只是说剧情进展特别顺利，很爽，在繁重工作后当做解压还不错。
总之我看（听)了这么久感觉还是挺不错的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685636728,"group_id":"7215022175693048892","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1ezg2pPuZO4ZckJPgO2FkE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fa6c29cf60d14e39b0ab5e3e20dc46d0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796484&x-signature=mTeAgIIyf4vsB8WhlEmqKWcV64o%3D","user_id":"84994352168","user_name":"KirinKi"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"84994352168","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7215022175693048892","book_info":{"abstract":"曹操：刘景升之子刘修果然神童也，此人有大气运！
